channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump puts allies on notice: AI power comes first
item.description: President Trump is redefining what it means to be a U.S. ally in the AI era. Why it matters: For the White House , it's now about how partners can hel...

item.title: America's 250th fireworks celebration faces burn-ban conflicts
item.description: Firework groups anticipate a surge in backyard fireworks this July 4, but drought conditions may limit displays.

item.title: Jobs report issues a warning for the labor market
item.description: The job market entered summer with less momentum than a month ago, signaling a cautionary note for the economy.

item.title: OpenAI seeks investment from Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI may offer the U.S. government a 5% stake, according to the Financial Times, though talks are preliminary.
